seoTitle: How to Set Up Gift Cards in Shopify for Holiday Sales
metaDescription: Learn how to create, customize, and price gift cards in Shopify so you can boost holiday revenue and bring customers back for repeat purchases.
intro: Gift cards are one of the easiest ways to pull in extra revenue during seasonal peaks while giving customers a low-friction way to spend on your store. This guide walks through creating a gift card product in Shopify, customizing how it looks, and setting a pricing strategy that fits your catalog. It's aimed at store owners who want a straightforward holiday sales lever without a lot of technical setup.

steps.heading: Create a gift card product
steps.body: In your Shopify admin, add a new product and mark it as a gift card so it behaves differently from a physical or downloadable item at checkout.

steps.heading: Customize the gift card's appearance
steps.body: Adjust the design and branding of the gift card so it matches your store, since this is what the customer receives and often shares with the recipient.

steps.heading: Set your pricing strategy
steps.body: Decide whether to offer fixed denominations or a range of values, and price them in a way that encourages larger purchases without discouraging casual buyers.

steps.heading: Plan how you'll market the gift cards
steps.body: Once the product exists, promote it through your existing marketing channels so it actually contributes to holiday sales instead of sitting unnoticed in your catalog.

steps.heading: Track redemptions and manage the program
steps.body: Keep an eye on how gift cards are used and redeemed over time, since this affects both your reported revenue and customer repeat-purchase behavior.

faq.question: Do I need an app to sell gift cards on Shopify?
faq.answer: No, Shopify supports gift cards as a native product type, so you can set one up directly from your admin without installing a third-party app.

faq.question: Can customers use a gift card alongside a discount code?
faq.answer: This depends on your store's checkout settings, so it's worth testing a purchase yourself before your holiday promotion goes live.

faq.question: Do gift cards expire on Shopify?
faq.answer: Expiration behavior depends on your store settings and local regulations, so check your gift card configuration before assuming they're valid indefinitely.

faq.question: Are gift cards worth setting up for a small store?
faq.answer: Yes, gift cards can help smaller stores extend reach and encourage repeat business, especially around holidays when they're commonly given as presents.
